name: Versailles Restaurant
reasoningTrace:
Resolving Versailles Restaurant → versaillesrestaurant.com…
Fetching homepage — classic Miami Cuban spot, heavy JPG menu PDFs detected.
Parsing contact: (305) 444-0240 found in footer only.
Checking mobile signals — no viewport meta in cached snapshot, tiny tap targets on menu links.
Scoring clarity: hero says 'Welcome' but not what makes Versailles special.
Scoring conversion: phone buried below fold — Wynwood tourists won't scroll.
Extracting brand: Cuban bakery + restaurant, 24hr, Calle Ocho landmark.
Overall 41/100 — huge room for a neon refresh with tap-to-call hero.

snapshot.title: Versailles Restaurant | Authentic Cuban Cuisine Miami
snapshot.description: Miami's most famous Cuban restaurant on Calle Ocho. Open 24 hours.
snapshot.rawText: Versailles Restaurant - Authentic Cuban Cuisine in Miami. Located on Calle Ocho in Little Havana. Famous for Cuban coffee, pastries, and classic dishes. Open 24 hours. Call (305) 444-0240. Menu includes ropa vieja, lechon asado, croquetas, and bakery items. Catering available. No online ordering on homepage.

clarity.reason: The homepage welcome message doesn't explain why Versailles is the Calle Ocho institution — new visitors don't get the story in 3 seconds.

trust.reason: Address and phone exist but only in the footer — no hours badge or Google reviews above the fold.

mobile.reason: Menu links open PDFs and small text — painful on a phone after a night out on Calle Ocho.

speed.reason: Large menu images and legacy layout likely slow first paint on mobile LTE.

conversion.reason: No tap-to-call button above the fold — tourists searching 'Cuban food near me' bounce when they can't call instantly.

localSeo.reason: Miami and Little Havana appear in copy but neighborhood landmarks and '24 hour' aren't in the hero for local search.

topFixes: Add a sticky tap-to-call button with (305) 444-0240 on mobile.
Rewrite hero: 'Miami's 24-hour Cuban landmark on Calle Ocho since 1971.'
Replace PDF menu links with scannable HTML sections and photos.

brand.tagline: Miami's 24-hour Cuban landmark on Calle Ocho
